title: Exists Partially Out of Phase
summary: A bit translucent, you’re slightly out of phase and can move through solid objects.
tiers: Tier 3: Phased Attack or Phase Door
Tier 6: Enhanced Phased Attack or Phase Foe
gm_intrusions: The character is sent phasing into an unexpected dimension. The character becomes lost in a large solid.
text: A bit translucent, you’re slightly out of phase and can move through solid objects.
details: A bit translucent, you’re slightly out of phase and can move through solid objects.
